"'''The Mandalorians: People and Culture'''" is an article in [[Star Wars Insider 86|''Star Wars Insider'' 86]] about [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] culture. It was written by [[Karen Traviss]] and illustrated by [[Tom Hodges]].

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

==Contents==
*Origins
*Warrior Nomads
*What Makes a Mandalorian
*Mandalorian Society
*The Mandalorian Family
*Religion and Spirituality
**''[[Ka'ra]]''
*The Concept of Dar-Manda
*Daily Life—and Death
*Food and Drink
*Armor
*Mixing with ''Mando'ade''

===No Word for Hero: The [[Mando'a/Legends|Mandalorian Language]]===
*Verbs
*Other Ways to Use Verbs
*Nouns and Other Parts of Speech
*Pronouns
*Adjectives and Adverbs: One and the Same
*Vocabulary
*Pronunciation
*Basic Phrases
*Mandalorian Language in its Culture Context
**[[Mandalorian pre-battle chant]]
